response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang backgrounds, but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no native Japanese proficiency, no demonstrated C programming for UNIX/embedded systems in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no exposure to networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switching). The brief C/C++ work at National Instruments in 2014-2015 is dated and unrelated to embedded networking security.
strengths: Long track record of professional software development across multiple domains
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments and Linux familiarity
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship mindset
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency listed (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, switch chip, or networking security (MACsec/802.1X) experience
No Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK experience

key_factors.factor: No recent C/UNIX or Linux kernel work
